prompt: A curbside loading zone at a modern shopping center with glass storefronts in the background. A white four-door sedan is parked at the curb, completely stationary, with its rear hatch lifted open revealing an empty cargo area. A small four-wheeled delivery robot with a white body and a sealed cardboard box on its flat cargo tray waits on the sidewalk next to the vehicle. A Unitree bipedal robot with a fully metallic silver body, articulated mechanical joints, and no human features stands at the rear of the car, reaching toward the delivery robot to pick up the cardboard box. Two pedestrians walk past on the sidewalk. Daytime, clear weather, blue sky. Wide angle, security camera perspective from above, static camera, no camera movement.
